column1: # Curse Eater — staging cards (27 new rows)
# Class mechanic: Loaded Count tracks absorbed curses. Cards either feed it, spend it, or twist it.
# L1 Core (5 new — brings total to 12)

column3: Reach into an ally within range; one of their debuffs climbs up your arm and settles in your chest as a Loaded stack. Ally is cleansed.
When an enemy curses an ally, step in and take the hit instead. Gain a Loaded stack and a beat of Guard.
Exhale the curses you carry as a cone of sickness. Spend Loaded stacks; each stack Exposes an enemy in the line.
Passive. The first debuff applied to you each round is absorbed as a Loaded stack instead of taking hold.
Spit a Loaded stack back at the thing that birthed it. Spend 1 Loaded to apply that curse's debuff to an enemy.
Your ribs make room. Raise your Loaded stack cap; when you absorb at full, the overflow becomes Guard instead of being wasted.
Passive upgrade. Once per turn, Absorb triggers twice — one curse for the count, one curse for the road.
Press both palms to a stricken ally. Remove all debuffs from them; convert half into Loaded, burn the rest to nothing.
Speak the names of what you've eaten. Allies within hearing gain Fortify against the next debuff that would touch them.
Move to a cursed ally and trade places with their suffering. You finish adjacent, they finish cleansed, you finish Loaded.
Passive. When you cleanse an ally with any card, gain a beat of Regen. Mercy feeds you back.
Plant your feet and open. For one round, enemy debuffs aimed at allies in your line route through you and exit as damage to the caster.
Strike with an open hand. Spend 1 Loaded; target takes a hit and inherits the exact debuff you swallowed.
Link two enemies with a filament of your Loaded count. For one round, debuffs applied to either are mirrored to the other.
Passive. Your Loaded Strike empties one more stack than it should, and the overflow arcs to the nearest enemy as Bleed.
Force-feed yourself a curse from the field. Apply a random strong debuff to yourself and gain 2 Loaded stacks.
Your mouth tastes like old iron. Passive: while you carry 3+ Loaded stacks, your melee hits apply Bleed.
Ignore your own suffering. For one round, debuffs on you deal no ill effect; each one instead adds a Loaded stack at end of turn.
Something grins beneath your skin. Spend HP to gain Loaded stacks at a one-to-one rate, up to your remaining cap.

column1: # L5 Power (2 new — brings total to 3)

column3: Open your chest like a book. All Loaded stacks leave you at once as a slow, ringing bell; every enemy in sight takes a hit per stack and every ally is cleansed.
Unlatch for one round. Every debuff applied anywhere on the field — ally or enemy — first feeds you a Loaded stack before it resolves.
A lantern ignites in your sternum. Cleanse all debuffs from all allies in sight; the curses do not go to Loaded — they cease to have ever happened.
Kneel beside a dying ally and take everything. They revive at a sliver of health, fully cleansed; you gain Loaded equal to what they carried.
Stitch every enemy in the room to your Loaded count for one round. Any debuff applied to you is copied to all of them.
Single devastating strike. Empty all Loaded stacks into one target; they take the full stored history of your campaign all at once.
Transform for one round. Your Loaded cap doubles, your hits apply a random debuff on contact, and you cannot be cleansed by any source.
Target one enemy. Consume every status on them — buff or debuff — and add each as a Loaded stack. They end the turn empty and afraid.
